folio:
I wyl telle it non other man , certeyn
This Carpenter goth doun , and cometh a geyn
And brougút of mygúty ale , a large quart
And wha~ne æ ecú of hem , had dronken his part312 The ink is the same but it seems that the scribe was using the same pen as the one I pointed out in KN, probably due to way of copying see if there are any correspondencies.This is true for folio 43v and folio 44rODR
This Nicholas , his dore faste shette
And dounö the Carpenter , by hi~ he sette
And seide Ioún myn host , lef and dere
Thow shalt vp on thy treuthe , swere me heere
That to no wygút , æè shalt my counseil wreye
For it is cristes counseil , æat I seye
And if æè telle ony man , æè art for lore
For this vengeaunce , thow shalt haue æäfore
That if æè wreye me , thow shalt be wode
¢ cNay , criste for bede it , for his holy blode322There was a red paraph next to this line, but it has been erased.ODR
Quod tho this sely man , I am non labbe
Ne thougú I sey it , I nam nat lief to gabbe
Sey what æè wyle , I shal it neuäe telle
To child ne wyf , by hi~ æ harwed helle
¢ Now Ioún q¶ this Nicholas , I wol æatnatænat lyedouble check the correction/ODR/
I haue founden , in myn Astrologye
As I haue loked , in the Mone brigút
That now on monday next , at quarter nygút
Shal fallen a reyn , and that so wylde & wood
That half so gret , was neuäe Noes flod
This world he seide , in lesse than an houre
Shal be dreynt , so hydous is the shoure
Thus shal mankynde , drenche , & lese here lif
¢ cThis Carpenter answered , allas my wyf 336There was a red paraph next to this line, but it has been cancelled.ODR
And shal she drenche , allas myn Alisouö
For sorwe of this , he fel al most a dounö
And seide , is there no remedye in this cas
We ©is forgode , q¶ hende Nicholas
If æè wylt werken , after lore and rede
Thow maist nat werken , after æin owen hede
For thus seith Salamouö , æ was ful trewe
Werk al by counseyl , and æow shalt nat rewe
And if thow werken wolt , by good counsaylle
I vndertake , with outen mast or saylle
ñet shal I saue hire , and the and me
Hast æè nat herd , how saued was Noe
Wha~ne æat oure lord , had warned hi~ bifornö
That al the world , w water shuld be lornö
¢ ñis q¶ this Carpentere , ful ©ore a go
Hast æè nat herd , q¶ Nicholas also
The sorwe of Noe , with his felaweshipe353The last three lines look like they are crammed in; the ink seems ligther.ODR
